response.step_by_step_log: Identified song 'All For One' from the concert title card and audio. Searched for 'All For One Hololive English lyrics' and found results. The lyrics are in English. For the second song at the end, I was unable to identify a title. Added basic metadata to the scenes.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert performance titled 'ALL FOR ONE' by the Hololive English group. It includes an opening segment with a stage introduction, followed by a song performance by multiple virtual VTuber idols, and closes with a graphic introduction sequence highlighting individual members. The primary song is 'All For One' by Hololive English.

scenes.description: Concert introduction with audience lighting and stage effects, leading to a graphic title card 'hololive English 3rd Concert ALL FOR ONE'.
Performance of 'All For One' by Hololive English VTubers. Lyrics appear on screen at times.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Ooh
Just look around and see, it's so incredible
So many smiles in a sea of light
Take one step with me and you'll be dazzled
There's magic in the air tonight
The hours zoom, zoom, zoom
My heart goes boom, boom, boom
The world is brighter because you believe in me
Let's shout it loud, loud, loud
Our time is right now, we're on the edge of destiny
For all the time I can dream with you
Every miracle we hope for might come true
We come together reaching out for far and light
And suddenly you're here by my side.

scenes.description: Graphic introduction sequence featuring individual Hololive English VTubers (Nerissa Ravencroft, Shiori Novella, Koseki Bijou, Raora Panthera, Mococo Abyssgard).
Performance of another song by Hololive English VTubers. Title and artist not explicitly provided in on-screen text, but part of the same concert.
